My hygienist was Jessie and she was amazingly nice and did a great work on my teeth. Sh
review2_text:
It was a great experience at Dr Miller's office. The office is hard to find but its located on the second floor of Firstbank building. So unless you are inside the building , you would not find Dr's name outside.
My hygienist was Jessie and she was amazingly nice and did a great work on my teeth. Sh
